title: National Insurance Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: National Insurance Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with National Insurance Holdings Services! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
